title.en: China-to-Congo-Brazzaville Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入刚果（布）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入剛果（布）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Congo-Brazzaville (Republic of the Congo) ACONOQ conformity requirements, ARSEL energy-sector licensing, E2C (Energie Electrique du Congo) grid-connection conditions, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 62920 EMC, 50 Hz 220/380 V grid settings, and donor/lender technical specifications (World Bank, AfDB) — versus China GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964 baselines. Note: this page covers the Republic of the Congo (capital Brazzaville), not the Democratic Republic of the Congo (capital Kinshasa).
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与刚果（布）（刚果共和国）ACONOQ合格评定要求、ARSEL能源行业许可、E2C（刚果电力）并网条件、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 62920 EMC、50 Hz 220/380 V电网参数及捐助方/贷款方技术规格（世界银行、非洲开发银行）——对比中国GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。注意：本页涵盖刚果共和国（首都布拉柴维尔），而非刚果民主共和国（首都金沙萨）。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與剛果（布）（剛果共和國）ACONOQ合格評定要求、ARSEL能源行業許可、E2C（剛果電力）併網條件、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 62920 EMC、50 Hz 220/380 V電網參數及捐助方/貸款方技術規格（世界銀行、非洲開發銀行）——對比中國GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。注意：本頁涵蓋剛果共和國（首都布拉薩市），而非剛果民主共和國（首都金沙薩）。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ACONOQ conformity scope determination, ARSEL licensing decision, E2C grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Congo-Brazzaville ACONOQ technical regulations, ARSEL licensing requirements, E2C grid-connection technical conditions, donor/lender specifications (World Bank, AfDB), and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation. Regulatory information for Congo-Brazzaville is limited in public-domain sources; body names and requirements stated here should be independently confirmed with in-country advisers.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ACONOQ合格评定范围裁定、ARSEL许可决定、E2C并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行刚果（布）ACONOQ技术法规、ARSEL许可要求、E2C并网技术条件、捐助方/贷款方规格（世界银行、非洲开发银行）及项目业主要求。刚果（布）的法规信息在公开来源中较为有限，本页所述机构名称和要求应通过当地顾问独立核实。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ACONOQ合格評定範圍裁定、ARSEL許可決定、E2C併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行剛果（布）ACONOQ技術法規、ARSEL許可要求、E2C併網技術條件、捐助方/貸款方規格（世界銀行、非洲開發銀行）及項目業主要求。剛果（布）的法規資訊在公開來源中較為有限，本頁所述機構名稱和要求應透過當地顧問獨立核實。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Congo-Brazzaville (Republic of the Congo), the key practical gaps are: (1) ACONOQ national conformity marking requirements — China GB certificates are not automatically accepted; (2) ARSEL licensing approval for grid-tied PV installations, which constitutes a regulatory gate independent of product certification; (3) E2C (Energie Electrique du Congo) connection approval, including anti-islanding evidence per IEC 62116 and grid-parameter validation for the 220/380 V, 50 Hz network; (4) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence, which donor-funded and lender-financed projects (World Bank, AfDB) typically require; (5) IEC 62920 EMC evidence; and (6) equatorial humidity and thermal derating documentation relevant to Congo-Brazzaville's climate. China GB/T 37408-2021 and GB/T 19964-2024 baselines are not accepted as substitutes for IEC-based evidence without supplementary IEC test reports. ACONOQ and ARSEL regulatory details are not comprehensively available in public-domain English sources — verify with in-country advisers.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口刚果（布）（刚果共和国）时，主要实际差距包括：（1）ACONOQ国家合格标志要求——中国GB证书不被自动接受；（2）ARSEL对并网光伏装置的许可批准，该监管门槛独立于产品认证；（3）E2C（刚果电力）并网批准，包括符合IEC 62116的防孤岛证据及针对220/380 V、50 Hz电网参数的验证；（4）IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据，由捐助方和贷款方（世界银行、非洲开发银行）资助的项目通常要求；（5）IEC 62920 EMC证据；（6）与刚果（布）气候相关的赤道高湿和热降额文件。中国GB/T 37408-2021和GB/T 19964-2024基准不可在没有补充IEC测试报告的情况下替代IEC证据。ACONOQ和ARSEL的监管细节在公开英文来源中并不完整——请向当地顾问核实。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口剛果（布）（剛果共和國）時，主要實際差距包括：（1）ACONOQ國家合格標誌要求——中國GB證書不被自動接受；（2）ARSEL對併網光伏裝置的許可批准，該監管門檻獨立於產品認證；（3）E2C（剛果電力）併網批准，包括符合IEC 62116的防孤島證據及針對220/380 V、50 Hz電網參數的驗證；（4）IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據，由捐助方和貸款方（世界銀行、非洲開發銀行）資助的項目通常要求；（5）IEC 62920 EMC證據；（6）與剛果（布）氣候相關的赤道高濕和熱降額文件。中國GB/T 37408-2021和GB/T 19964-2024基準不可在沒有補充IEC測試報告的情況下替代IEC證據。ACONOQ和ARSEL的監管細節在公開英文來源中並不完整——請向當地顧問核實。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
